title: Jubail, Eastern Province — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Jubail, Eastern Province: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Jubail is a city in Eastern Province with a population of 475,000. A major industrial city in the Eastern Province, home to the world’s largest petrochemical complex.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
